reviews.title: A wonderful resort to stay in with family and friends!
reviews.positives:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at Vinpearl Nam Hoi An, and overall, it was a truly wonderful experience.
From the moment we arrived, the staff across all areas were consistently friendly, courteous, and helpful. Our check-in experience was smooth and pleasant, thanks especially to the team at the front desk. The staff member who checked us in was incredibly kind and offered us an upgrade to a villa closer to the lobby — a thoughtful gesture that I deeply appreciated, as my mother has difficulty walking long distances.
The villa itself was fantastic — spacious, well-appointed, and comfortable. That said, it appeared there was a slight miscommunication upon our arrival. When we entered the villa, the housekeeping staff was still in the midst of cleaning, and a cleaning rag had been left behind on the headboard of the twin-bedded room. While this was a minor issue, it didn’t take away from our enjoyment of the space.
We did notice that other villas had cushions on their poolside sunbeds, but ours did not, which meant we couldn’t really use them to lounge around the pool area — something that could be improved for future guests.
The food experience was another highlight. Breakfast at the Lantern restaurant was excellent, and I truly appreciated the dedicated Halal section — a thoughtful inclusion that made our dining experience worry-free. We also had dinner at the buffet one evening and were pleased with both the variety and quality of the offerings. Room service was equally commendable, handling our dietary restrictions with ease and offering quick, suitable alternatives when needed.
Overall, service was top-notch throughout our stay. The attention to guest comfort and the genuine hospitality of the staff made this a memorable trip. I would happily return and recommend Vinpearl Nam Hoi An to others seeking a relaxing, family-friendly getaway.
reviews.negatives:
While our overall stay at Vinpearl Nam Hoi An was enjoyable, I did want to share some feedback regarding the maintenance of the villa.
There were a few areas that could benefit from better upkeep. We noticed a visible stain on the sofa in the living area, which affected the overall impression of cleanliness and comfort. Additionally, one of the curtains had a noticeable tear — a small detail, but something that stood out in an otherwise well-presented villa.
Another point of disappointment was the TV in the living room. Unlike the TVs in the bedrooms, it didn’t have the option to access Netflix or similar streaming platforms. It would have been nice to enjoy shared entertainment in the common area, especially during downtime.
These are minor issues in the grand scheme of things, but addressing them would definitely enhance the guest experience and help maintain the high standards the resort is known for.

reviews.title: Dirty Room Covered by Urine
reviews.text: As soon as I checked in the day before yesterday, I found that a seat cover of a toilet bowl was all stained with urine. Disgusting!!! I cleaned the seat cover and reported it. A housing keeping manager promised to clean my room thoroughly next day. When I left my room at 12:30 yesterday, I pressed a 'Clean My Room' button and also hung 'Clean My Room' sign on the door. And I came back to my room at 22:30 and found that the house keeping did not clean my room at all. More surprising thing is that somebody, probably a housekeeper, came in and turned some of the lights off. Of course, I called and reported the situation. However, a staff responded as if it is not a single problem as long as they would bring new towels to me soon. I got angry. In10~20 minutes, a duty manager dropped by and provided fresh towels and emptied some of trash cans. She told me that she would like to talk about the situation in the next morning as it was too late to talk. But neither she nor anyone else contacted me and apologized today. Vinpearl does not do what they must do. And then they always promises to it tomorrow. But the tomorrow never comes because they will repeat "I will do it tomorrow" tomorrow. Vinpearl should not run hospitality business.

reviews.title: Overall a pleasant stay and we wished we had stayed an additional night.
reviews.positives: We stayed in a 2 bedroom villa which was huge and comfortable. The property is located far from old town but it feels like a town by itself. It has large garden which was very calm and serene. Also has an in house clinic which was very handy.
reviews.negatives: The room was old and needed bit of a maintenance.

reviews.title: Unresolved Issues and Unsatisfactory Service
reviews.text: I was generally satisfied with the trip, but the distance was far and the room service food was not tasty. The worst part was the deposit card amount, which I had to be careful about. The cancellation didn't go through, so I had to wait a few days when checking out. Although they promised to contact me via KakaoTalk message and email, I had to call every day because they didn't contact me. They blamed the bank or my card issuer, saying I had to wait 10 days, which is ridiculous. I don't think I will ever go to a hotel that can't resolve such issues quickly, and I don't recommend it to Korean travelers or any other travelers.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay. Too far from the center.
reviews.positives: Spacious rooms. Beautiful lawn and nice beach. Friendly staff and good service. Awesome breakfast buffet. They threw together a pretty fun New Year’s Eve gala with fireworks, despite the cheesy entertainment.
reviews.negatives:
Too far from Hoi A center. Not recommended for first time visitors. The rooms were very humid. All of our belongings felt damp and smelled moldy after we left the resort. Not enough hot water for a family of four to shower all at once. 

Our unit has a kitchen that was completely useless—no plates, not cutlery, no cookware, only a few teacups and small water glasses. Lots of empty kitchen cabinets. There was not even a trash can nor kitchen towel. You have to call room service if you need a bowl or chopsticks. They made it clear that they don’t really want us to cook. Why then would you build a kitchen?! What a waste of space. 

With the exception of the breakfast buffet, all the other foods, e.g. both dinner buffet and a la cart restaurants, are very mediocre—catered to foreigners tastes, even the Vietnamese dishes didn’t taste authentic.

reviews.title: Perfect for families with kids
reviews.positives:
- Amazing staff
- Amazing Hotel
- Amazing room
- Amazing food
- Amazing outdoors

The staff was extremely nice and so sweet, especially to all the kids. It felt like the Disneyland. The spoke good English and the receptionist were very helpful. No communication issues at all. 

The food was soo good. Lots of choices. Even for vegetarian and vegan. The breakfast and dinner buffet was so yummy. It was almost our highlight of the day.

The hotel is huge with lots of space. It’s extremely clean and very well taken care of. Nice decoration during Christmas. 

The pool and beach were big but it was raining so we couldn’t use it unfortunately. 

Great playroom for kids with lots of activities and the park right next to it. 

Rooms were big and clean, bed very comfortable, clean and big.
reviews.negatives:
It’s an hour from the airport but the shuttle bus pick up was smooth and comfortable. Just not easy if you want to visit Da Nang downtown. Only Hoi An is possible to visit and the hotel provides a shuttle bus too. 

The hotel offers a few more trips but locations are far and it’s costly. 

Room: if you use the bathroom at night the light shines brightly through to the bedroom which was a bit annoying due to our sleeping toddler.

reviews.title: A 5-star resort where the advantages are clear, but the disadvantages are also distinctly evident.
reviews.text:
The overall environment, aside from the room condition, is very good, fitting for a 5-star resort. The breakfast is excellent, and I would like to give high marks for amenities such as the swimming pool and the private beach accessible only to guests. However, the disadvantages were just as clear as the advantages.

1. Extremely poor Wi-Fi conditions made it completely impossible to access the internet during peak times, and I was hardly able to use it throughout my two-night stay. There may be differences depending on the service provider, but such a network environment in a 5-star resort is very puzzling and disappointing.

2. Limitations of dining and convenience facilities The resort's structure only allows for dining at the on-site restaurant, with few options for delivery, and the prices are relatively high. It is not easy to arrange for delivery given the distance from the city, and having at least a convenience store within the resort would have been much better.

3. Ambiguous location and transportation costs While individual experiences may vary, the taxi fare for round trips to Hoi An Old Town was around 600,000 VND. It takes over an hour to get to the airport by shuttle bus, and the Hoi An shuttle is paid (80,000 VND per person) and requires waiting until 9:30 PM for the return. Families need to consider their children's condition when using this service.

4. Disappointment with reception service Lastly, my poor English and the fact that I hardly speak it made the reception staff's slightly frustrated attitude and expression during our initial interaction disappointing. Although it's a relative matter, I feel there is a need for training.

Overall, I would recommend this place if you're looking to enjoy a "hotel vacation" without any other concerns. However, if a family of four, like us, has to pay around 280,000 won per night including additional costs, I think there are many better alternatives in that price range.

Note: I evaluate Vin Wonders separately as I believe it is an entirely different environment from the resort.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Yu Kyunghoon,
Thank you sincerely for taking the time to share your detailed and candid feedback regarding your stay at Vinpearl Resort & Golf Nam Hoi An. We truly appreciate your positive comments about our overall environment, accommodation, dining experience, and resort facilities.
At the same time, please accept my sincere apologies for the inconveniences you experienced, particularly in relation to Wi-Fi connectivity, dining options, transportation arrangements, and your experience at the front desk. Your valuable feedback has been carefully noted and shared with the relevant departments for review and service enhancement.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a more refined experience that fully meets your expectations.
 
Kind regards,
Vo Ba Chuong - General Manager

reviews.title: Viel Licht und ein wenig Schatten - aber es war sein Geld wert.
reviews.positives:
Uns hat es im Vinpearl Hotel Hoi An sehr gut gefallen. Es waren zwar sehr viele Kinder da, was aber daran liegt dass wir zum Neujahrsfest dort waren. Zum anderen ist das auch dem an das Hotel angrenzenden Wasserpark geschuldet, der bei Kindern einfach gut ankommt.
Das Personal war einfach hervorragend. Unwahrscheinlich freundlich, hilfsbereit und zuvorkommend - So stellt man sich ein 5-Sterne-Hotel vor. Die Pool-Landschaft war sehr schön mit ausreichend Platz. Alles war super sauber, man hat keinerlei Verschleiß feststellen können. Das Zimmer war angenehm groß mit bequemen Betten und einem großen Bad. Die Erstausstattung der Minibar war im Preis mit inklusive.
Das Frühstücksbuffet war sehr umfangreich und geschmacklich sehr gut - hier findet wirklich jeder was. In der Rooftop-Bar hatten wir an 2 Abenden Live-Musik. Das Essen war dort sehr wohlschmeckend, die Getränke sehr Gurt und das Personal war dort auch super freundlich und zuvorkommend.
Und dann der Strand: Ich habe schon etliche schöne Strände auf der Welt gesehen, aber dieser Starnd ist einer der besten: kilometerlang feiner weißer Sand, super sauber und nur wenig Besucher. Das ist Urlaubsidylle pur.
reviews.negatives: Die Lage unseres Zimmers, der Balkon war genau oberhalb der Ladezone und da war immer Trubel. Aber zu dieser Seite gehen leider viele Zimmer. Andere Zimmer gehen in Richtung Pool, wo es auch nicht gerade leise sein wird. Weiterhin war unser Zimmer auch etwas hellhörig, wir haben sowohl die Kinder im Flur als auch die Ehestreitigkeiten aus einem der Nebenzimmer mitbekommen. Die beiden Speisesäle mit Buffet-Selbstbedienung waren sehr groß (was auch der Größe des Hotels geschuldet ist) und haben den Charme einer Kantine mit einer entsprechenden Lautstärke. Und hier laufen leider auch die Kinder rum und versuchen etwas sich vom Buffet zu angeln, wo man bei jedem Schritt auf die Kleinen aufpassen muss.

On a positive note, the staff and customer service were excellent. Both the buffet dinner and buffet breakfast were very good. Our child especially enjoyed the River Safari, and the hotel’s location is very convenient.

We took the package including unlimited access with free transport (just 5min drive) to VinWonder theme park, water park and river safari etc, which is a good deal, very few visitors and we even took roller coaster rides with just two persons at times.
Staff are helpful, polite, friendly and prompt.

reviews.title: Great resort with the usual compromises
reviews.text:
Stunning resort. We stayed in a private villa with pool, kids loved it. A good range of facilities on site and easy access to Vinwonders if you're interested in wading into one of Vietnam's often wacky and often empty theme parks. 

The compromise of a resort like this is that it is 30 minutes plus from Hoi An old time and had you at somewhat of a ransom with food options. The restaurants are shockingly overpriced, with food at Cafeteria level & drinks no better.

If you don't mind the Trek into Hoi An or forking out hundreds for  a meal you wouldn't pay $50 for back home (or $10 out & about in Vietnam!) it's really good.

reviews.text: A place with a stunning entrance and lobby. The view from the room is really pretty. The kids absolutely loved it. However, the water pressure was a bit low and the shower drainage wasn't very good. There was some water staining, but that's quite common in any hotel~~ The pool is spacious, and the beach is exotic and beautiful. The sand is so fine that it feels nice when you walk on it. The breakfast is delicious. There is a free shuttle to Da Nang Airport, and there is also a shuttle to the Old Town, but this one requires payment. I found that a bit disappointing. I think it could have been provided as a service for guests~~ The cost of taking the bus or using Grab was pretty much the same, so I just used Grab.

reviews.title: Grand hotel with a long beach
reviews.text:
The hotel is grand. We are grateful that the hotel provided us rooms on the highest floor as we had requested rooms on high floor. We booked two rooms with garden view, nevertheless we could see the beach from the balconies. The room and the bathroom were spacious and clean. The qualities of coffee bags, tea bags and toiletries provided were of good.

The swimming pool was large and had a fabulous view of the beach, however there was not enough shaded areas in the pool for escaping the scorching sun. The beach was large with soft sands and had an exceptional long coastline and the waves were not small. I thought it was not suitable for swimming.  The lifeguard was attending whenever guests were approaching the seashore.  I saw two small motor sampans were cruising about 70m away the seashore and were following the directions of the guests who were walking on the shore. The sampans might have used to rescue swimmers in case of accidents. The motor sound of the sampans broke the tranquility, but it was necessary for the safety of swimmers. There were a lot of grass roofed beach huts with beach chairs and tables. It was really comfortable for having a nap or having a drink and chatting with friends on the chair where the breeze was cool and the scene was beautiful. I would rather sit on the beach chair than sit on the poolside chair, as the pool area was hotter.

The restaurants were elegant.  The breakfast buffet was good and delicious with a variety of foods. The lunch and dinner provided by the other restaurant in the hotel were tasty too, but the menu had limited choices.  As the location of the hotel is quite remote, you cannot find other restaurants around.  I hope the hotel would provide a variety of cuisines. 

There were some incidents during our stay.  My siblings were locked in her room as the swing bar lock could not be loosen. Luckily, the staff had it repaired quickly and they were free.  I found the swing bar lock in my room was malfunction too. Moreover, the electric kettle in my room could not switch off automatically when the water was boiled.  I had to disconnect the kettle power cord once the water was boiled. In addition, there was a large apparent stain on the velvet chair in my room. Therefore, there was only one chair which we could use. I would love the hotel management to keep a good maintenance of the rooms.

As a whole, we had a good time in the hotel and I would recommend it to my relatives and friends to stay in when they visit Nam Hoi An.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Cảnh quan đẹp, bãi biển dài. Các món ăn ổn.
reviews.negatives: Tôi đặt dịch vụ phòng kèm xe đưa đón sân bay nhưng không ai liên hệ với tôi là xe sẽ đón như thế nào. Đến khi tôi gọi lại thì báo là chỉ có xe bus và sẽ đón muộn sau khi máy bay hạ cánh gần 2 giờ. Tôi cũng đã không ngủ được vì sự ồn ào của phòng bên cạnh kèm theo tủ lạnh phát ra âm thanh rất lớn vào ban đêm. Khóa cửa phòng không nhạy nên mở cửa khó. Khi tham gia trò chơi đu quay dây văng ở Vinwonder tôi phải bỏ dép ra nhưng bước vào tấm sắt khiến tôi bỏng chân vì năng lượng ánh sáng mặt trời. Tóm lại tôi không thấy thoải mái ở kỳ nghỉ này với Vinpearl.

reviews.title: Family trip with the baby and in-laws.
reviews.text: The cleanliness was not as good as I expected. I took off my shoes to live comfortably for my baby who is just starting to walk, but I kept stepping on something on the floor. Even considering that they probably expected guests to wear shoes, it wasn't very clean. The pool was very satisfying, but it wasn't as private as I thought; it felt like we would greet guests from nearby accommodations if they opened their curtains. The service and breakfast were excellent, especially the coffee, banh mi, and pho, which I enjoyed very much. My mother-in-law was also very satisfied with the kimchi soup, and I really appreciated the ice service and the heating service.

Warm regards,
Tran Huynh Nguyet Truc – Director of Operations

reviews.title: I recommend it.
reviews.text: It took more than an hour to get to the airport from Nam Hoi An. There’s nothing around, but it’s right next to VinWonders, so it would be a good place for those who want to stay. The resort facilities were clean and nice, and all the staff were friendly. I moved accommodations while traveling in other areas, and I should have just stayed here. It was a great place for families to comfortably use. In fact, while traveling in Vietnam, there are many people who aren't friendly to Koreans, but the staff here were really nice. I plan to stay here again the next time I go to Da Nang.

reviews.title: A wonderful experience
reviews.text: This is perhaps the most distinctive hotel in the Vinpearl hotel system. Everything is neat and managed professionally. The hotel is close to Hoi An and Vinpearl Land, making it suitable for both children and adults. There is a restaurant where you can have lunch and dinner with very Vietnamese or Korean dishes. The quality and service are quite good. In the evening, there may be live music on the lawn, which is wonderful when you can eat, drink beer, and listen to music. If you buy a package that includes tickets to Vinpearl Land, you can come and go as you please, playing until you're tired, then resting at the hotel before heading back to play again. There is a shuttle service going continuously between the hotel and the amusement park. If you stay at Vin, you also get other perks, such as being able to take the shuttle from the station right at the entrance. The staff is enthusiastic and professional. I will be coming back.

Toàn thể đội ngũ nhân viên rất mong muốn được chào đón bạn quay trở lại ''ngôi nhà thứ hai'' mang tên Vinpearl Resort & Golf Nam Hội An.
Trân trọng,

reviews.title: Vinpearl Nam Hoi An. A friendly accommodation with a wonderful main pool.
reviews.text: All staff are kind and feedback on inquiries or requests is prompt. The bar was closed after one visit, but the staff took care of it afterward. When I requested a replacement for the refrigerator because it wasn't cooling well, they provided a cool one. The accommodation is neat and upscale, considering its age. The main pool is large and impressive, and it's close to the sea. The bathroom drainage and the location of the accommodation were a bit disappointing, but despite a few shortcomings, I would highly recommend this wonderful accommodation due to the friendly staff. If I come to Hoi An again, I would like to stay here again.

reviews.text:
This is my second visit to Nam Hoi An Vinpearl. It was clean, the rooms were spacious, and it was pleasant and nice. 

However, there was a lack of guidance regarding hotel usage during check-in. I had booked including VinWonders, but I was informed that I had to check out before 10 AM on the last day for it to be possible, which confused me due to incorrect information provided to the customer. Additionally, usually, in a 5-star hotel, they offer a welcome tea and hospitality, but in this Vinpearl, I only received the key during check-in, and there was almost no explanation about the hotel.

reviews.title: В целом мы довольны своим пребыванием в отеле! Для семей это отличный вариант.
reviews.positives:
Замечательный пляж: широкий, длинный и пустой (людей почти нет). Хорошее море. Большой бассейн. Замечательные виллы - реально стоят своих денег. Номер сьют тоже очень хороший. Удобные матрасы и подушки. Завтрак - вкусно и разнообразно. 
Территория очень большая, красивая и зеленая.
Большой кидсклаб, но вот няню можно взять только для ребенка старше 2-х лет.
Рядом город Хойань - туда стоит съездить покататься по реке с фонариками вечером, ну и в целом погулять по городу, ну а днем - Coconut basketboat. 
Рядом Winwonders - если есть дети, то для разнообразия можно разок сходить.
reviews.negatives:
1. Плохо убирались на пляже. Не было ни одной урны. Бутылки, окурки, фантики валялись у лежаков днями. Понятно, что основная масса туристов - местные, которым пляж не нужен, им важнее бассейн, но все равно для отеля такого уровня это непозволительно. При этом саму территорию убирают отлично. В чем проблема убраться на пляже - загадка.
2. Рядом нет ресторанов и кафе. Граб тоже мало что доставляет в отель. А в самом отеле ресторан один и не очень интересный. Есть шведский стол, но как мы поняли, это только для пакетников, что там - не знаем.

reviews.title: Satisfaction with activities from the zoo, amusement park, hotel, to the swimming pool.
reviews.text: We enjoyed a zoo visit, amusement park, water park, and hotel swimming pool for our 2-night, 3-day stay, which felt short with a 6-year-old and a 3-year-old. The water park was somewhat outdated and was not operating activities like high slides, which seems better suited for older elementary school kids. There was only one pool area for toddlers to play. Since our children are toddlers, they played more at the hotel pool than at the water park. It was not inconvenient to move around according to the buggy shuttle schedule when at VinWonders. There are only two restaurants operating, so one day we took a taxi to Hoi An Old Town for dinner and shopping, which was nice. The location is quite far from Da Nang, so if you're only thinking of Hoi An without touring Da Nang city, it’s a very good accommodation for families with children, clean and with plenty of activities.

reviews.title: Отель с парком Винперл
reviews.positives:
Отель большой, помпезный, состоит из двух корпусов. Персонал вежливый, все улыбаются, кланяются, всегда готовы помочь. Народу много. Завтраки проходят сразу в двух ресторанах, поэтому все помещаются. Выбор большой, еда разнообразная. Дают суп фо на выбор с мясом или с курицей. Остальное стандартное. Из фруктов были сердце и глаз дракона, дыня, арбуз, маракуйя, мандарины, яблоки. Вход по Face ID, как и в Нячанге в этой же сети отелей, как и в парк. 
Бассейн глубиной 1,2 м. Широченная песчаная полоса пляжа. Вход в море пологий, песчаный как и дно, никаких камней нет. Частенько волны, но они такие, на которых качаться можно. Вода теплейшая, как пишут 30 градусов, и на это похоже.
reviews.negatives: Находится на отшибе, ничего вокруг нет кроме парка Vinwonders, до которого три минуты езды на багги. От отеля и обратно они постоянно курсируют. Можно даже взять проживание с включенным проходом в парк.

reviews.title: In summary, I will never stay at another Vinpearl property again nor will I recommend vinpearl to any friends or family.
reviews.negatives:
Service was terrible, staff weren’t helpful and basic communication skills were severely lacking. 
Whilst 6 of my friends were allowed to charge for food and drinks to their rooms I was made to pay on the spot. 
Everyone from my group booked through a different company but were given a 600,000 dong voucher, I wasn’t because I booked through booking.com
Whilst the property looks new and lavish the services very abysmal.

Terribly disappointing stay!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
We recently stayed at Vinpearl Resort & Spa Nam Hoi An, and overall it was a very enjoyable experience, especially for families looking for a combination of relaxation and entertainment.

One of the biggest highlights is the unlimited access to VinWonders Nam Hoi An for in-house guests. This is truly a huge plus. Being able to go back and forth freely without worrying about ticket costs adds tremendous value to the stay, especially if you’re traveling with children. It makes the trip more flexible and much more fun.

The resort itself has a sleek, modern design with a spacious and well-maintained atmosphere. The pool is impressively large — perfect for swimming laps or simply relaxing by the water. It never felt cramped, even during busier hours.

Our room was another highlight. The bathroom was exceptionally big, giving a real sense of luxury and comfort. The bed was extremely comfortable — easily one of the best parts of the stay — ensuring we slept very well after long days exploring the theme park and enjoying the facilities.

Overall, if you’re looking for a modern beachfront resort with great amenities and unbeatable access to entertainment next door, Vinpearl Nam Hoi An is definitely worth considering.

reviews.title: Plus, a separate area and quite quiet, but the hotel is not worth the money in terms of a beach rest

reviews.negatives: Dirty flooring in the lobby and corridors. Dirty rooms and shabby furniture. Below average service, you constantly have to beg for drinking water in your room, and in the bar it costs $2.50 for 0.5L. When checking in, we indicated the wrong room number, we couldn't find it for almost an hour, and after that we weren't even offered any compliments. The sauna and jacuzzi (especially the women's half) are disgusting. The large pool is 1.2 m deep, so you can hardly swim. Naturally, there aren't enough sun loungers around the pool. The beach is sandy - they clean it, the sea is pretty clean (no household or plastic waste), but sometimes a strange turbidity appears that leaves stains on the body and causes allergies. The sun loungers on the beach are very far from the water. Some showers near the beach don't work.

reviews.positives: Clean and well maintained in general

The location is far away from any restaurants and the restaurants on site are mainly buffet only. The only restaurant that offered an a la carte menu had very poor standard of food and weird selection of foods for local and international guests. 

To heat food, you have to call in and ask for food to be heated, then wait for staff to come and collect the food, take it to the kitchen staff and heat it and then bring it back. By that time the food is cold again. Very poor system and simply does not work and take too long. Not good enough for the price we paid for the villa which advertised a kitchen setup. There were also very limited plates, glasses and cutlery.

The old town of Hoi An was very pretty and lovely. Personally, I found Hoi An more relaxed and enjoyable than Da Nang.

reviews.text: I think you can really enjoy a variety of things for around 100,000 won. The room is spacious and pleasant, and the balcony is nice and wide. However, the disappointing part was that a small cockroach appeared...^^ The staff offered to change the room, but I was too lazy and just stayed there. The pool is very large and it's great that there's a private beach as well. The depth of the pool is 1.2m, but since it's not warm water, it was cold on bad weather days. The best part was being able to use the sauna and jacuzzi for free, almost exclusively. I could comfortably use the dry sauna and steam sauna, as well as the warm jacuzzi by myself, which was fantastic. Be sure to choose a room that includes the Vee Wonders! When we went, the line was long, but hotel guests could enter right away without waiting. Also, there were more rides than I expected, and the river safari was great, so I highly recommend it. The breakfast and dinner buffets were delicious!

reviews.title: Vinpearl offered spacious comfort and amusement park fun, but was let down by cleaning, hard beds, and lackluster design
reviews.positives: On the positive side, the size of the villa was impressive, offering ample space and comfort. The breakfast selection was extensive, providing a perfect start to the day. The amusement park was a hit with the kids, adding a fun element to our stay. Additionally, the hotel's quiet location contributed to a peaceful and relaxing atmosphere, which we greatly appreciated.
reviews.negatives: However, there were drawbacks. The cleaning didn't meet our expectations for thoroughness, leaving room for improvement in comfort. The beds were extremely hard, affecting our sleep quality. Additionally, the bathroom drains emitted an unpleasant odor, and the hotel's design felt cold and unwelcoming. It's also worth noting that the hotel is somewhat far from the nearest city, but the provided shuttle service adds convenience to getting around.

reviews.title: Luxury Beach Escape
reviews.text:
Vinpearl Resort & Golf was luxe. The bedding was comfortable. The resort is located out on its own. If you want to walk the local streets its a taxi/grab/shuttle drive away. The beach setting was what we loved about the resort. 
Our stay had inclusions like the airport shuttle pickup/dropoff which worked out so well for us and made us feel extra special.
This stay was hard to fault, and if there was any issue it was rectified promptly. 
We hope to stay next year and bring 2 of our teenagers.
Oh, a shout-out for the breakfast buffet!! It was one of the best Ive ever been to!!
Thanks Vinpearl 🥰

reviews.title: Unpleasant, location too far and staffs unhelpful, room not clean properly.
reviews.positives: Spacious suite with ocean view.
reviews.negatives:
Staffs were tricky, rude and unattwntive to our needs.  We booked Double Delux room with ocean view. We were offered an upgrade to a suite with ocean view, around 3:30pm we were taken to Romm 6447 with garden view and peak of oven far apart.  We came down to reception before 4pm to catch the 4pm shuttle bus to town for dinner, I told them we didn’t pay extra to have garden view with oceanview far away and the suite opposite us, Room 6432 would be closer to the beach, they said they will sort it out and call us.  By 8pm no phone call yet, I called them 4x and they insisted that someone’s will call me back and none one did. I remembered after I booked they msg me via Watsapp, so I msg them there and they said still sorting for us as there are no rooms left. I told them it didn’t take that long with technology nowadays it all showed on the computer. They ask if we could Move room tomorrow. We came out for the weekend, why the hassle move one night. I ask for the manager to call me as we didn’t pay extra for upgrade to see trees, we wanted to wake up to ocean view with sunrise.
Finally about 10pm they told us they have a room.
We arrived back at the hotel 10:30pm and the receptionist was not friendly, no apologies n told us no bellboy to help move out luggages across to the new room 6432 opposite. We said it’s ok, we can do it ourselves. A guy in a white shirt casually said, it’s bad to let you go up yourself, let me go up with you and help you move across and get the old keys from you. On the way up, he told us the room 6432 we are moving into checked out at 4pm already and it is a much nicer room, and it was a room we wanted with pool and ocean view right in front. We felt tricked that they gave us the garden suite and spoilt our first night like that, making us wait and not willing to give us this empty room that we paid for. Local tourists very unhygienic, they pick food with their hands, smell and threw it back. They shove push to get pass you without an apology.

reviews.title: Great on 70% off rate for a week
reviews.positives:
We booked at 70% off rate on same day as check in. This is what made our stay feel like good value for money, as personally I wouldn’t pay full price for it. 
The breakfast buffet was great - except for the random days there was no soy milk (lactose intolerant). Everything was fresh and delicious. The juice options were great and enough for everyone in variation. 
The buffet dinner was great, it changed every night but most nights it has more than enough - I am pescatarian so great seafood options - scallops, mussels, one night had many salmon dish varieties.
Great kids club with its own shallow pool and friendly staff.
Clean pool and beach and ample grounds to roam with kids. If you’re coming here for a few days seems you can’t go wrong, but I wouldn’t come here if I didn’t have kids haha.
reviews.negatives:
- There was a timetable for kids activities like cupcake decorating etc that didn’t seem to exist. But it was fine because the kids got to enjoy some random activities like kite flying, flax weaving to make an animal etc. The activities in the kids room like nail panting should be free though. 
- The water in the rooms is disgusting (I never use this word). It tastes like soap, every single bottle. There is no where in the lobby to fill a drink bottle - so you’re stuck being thirsty the entirety of your stay. 
- For the buffet price, atleast simple juice or flavoured water could be included in the buffet (similar like breakfast). 
- There was one day that the cleaners didn’t come at all. Other days they’d wait till 4pm. We have a 2 and 4 year old so afternoons can get tricky. 
- Would have been nice to have VinWonders ticket included in the price but 10% off is okay
- I recommend considering full board if you’re a big eater as there’s nothing else in the vicinity food-wise.

reviews.title: The pearl paradise that lives up to its name, a five-star hotel worth recommending. 👍
reviews.text:
Highly recommended five-star hotel, having previously stayed at the Pearl Group hotels makes me want to return again~ This time we will celebrate a family member's birthday, so I chose to stay here~ Since I booked a villa and a double room in the main building, I emailed in advance requesting to arrange them nearby, and the hotel responded very quickly to accommodate my request 👍

The hotel registers each guest with Face ID for check-in, which allows entry into the restaurant and access to the Pearl Paradise (where tickets purchased at the hotel allow unlimited entry), very convenient!

The hotel service is great; the staff during our stay were all very helpful—at the front desk, they patiently answered all my questions. You can see hotel staff everywhere smiling and greeting guests!

Hotel environment: In the main building, there is a large infinity pool, and just outside is a private beach—clear water and fine sand; it might be too hot, so not many people were around, giving a feeling of enjoying the sun on a secluded beach!

Villa: The three-bedroom villa has two floors—each of the three rooms has an ensuite bathroom, so there’s no need to fight with family over swimming time! There’s a private pool outside the villa—not too deep, perfect for those who don’t swim well to enjoy at any time!

Main building double room: Larger than typical rooms, with a big terrace offering a view of the beach and sea!

Restaurants: During this stay, we tried two different restaurants for dinner—one is a buffet where you can leisurely eat for four hours, offering many options; it would be even better if there were more seafood—the grilled shrimp was excellent. The other is a Korean restaurant offering various dishes with a focus on Korean BBQ.

The breakfast buffet has a wide selection—especially the freshly made Vietnamese pho and French bread, along with various coffees and fresh juices—different options over the two days!

In summary—although the hotel location is slightly remote, I am very satisfied overall—its facilities and service feel worth it. If I return next time, I will still choose this hotel—looking forward to my next stay!

Special thanks to the front desk staff 🙏🙏

reviews.title: The Pearl Paradise Hotel, which lives up to its name, is worth recommending. 👍👍
reviews.text:
Highly recommended five-star hotel. Having previously stayed at the Pearl Group hotels made me want to return. This time we are celebrating a family birthday, so I chose to stay here. Since I booked a villa and a double room in the main building, I emailed in advance to request that they be arranged nearby, and the hotel replied quickly to accommodate my request. 

The hotel requires face ID registration for each check-in, which is needed to enter the restaurant and access the Pearl Paradise (where you can buy tickets at the hotel for unlimited entry). It's very convenient!

The hotel service is excellent. During my stay, the staff were very nice; the front desk staff answered my questions patiently every time. I saw hotel staff everywhere, and they would nod and smile to greet me!

Hotel environment: The main building has a large infinity pool in the middle, and there's a private beach just outside. The water is clear and the sand is fine. Perhaps it was too hot, so there weren't many people around, making it feel like I could enjoy the beach and sunshine alone!

Villa: The three-bedroom villa has two levels, and all three rooms have their own bathrooms, so there's no need to compete for space after swimming. There’s a private pool outside the villa, which is not too deep, making it suitable for those who don't swim well to enjoy at any time!

Main building double room: Larger than regular rooms, with a big terrace offering views of the beach and sea.

Restaurant: This time, we tried two different restaurants for dinner. One was a buffet where you can leisurely dine for four hours, with many choices, although more seafood options would be better. The grilled shrimp was excellent. The other was a Korean restaurant, offering other dish options with a focus on Korean barbecue.

The buffet breakfast had a variety of options, especially the freshly made Vietnamese noodles and bread, different coffees, and fresh juices. The offerings varied over the two days I stayed!

In summary, although the hotel's location is a bit remote, I was very satisfied overall. The amenities and services were worth it, and I would choose this hotel again next time. Looking forward to staying here again!

Special thanks to the front desk staff! 🙏🙏

reviews.title: Vinpearl Resort honest opinion
reviews.positives:
We recently stayed at Vinpearl Resort & Golf Nam Hoi An and overall had a very enjoyable and memorable experience. The resort is impressive, but what really stood out was the service. Our driver, Ky, was outstanding throughout our stay. He went above and beyond to assist us, always polite, reliable, and genuinely helpful. Thuy An  also added a lot to the experience with great advice, charm, and a very warm approach that made us feel well looked after during our restaurant visits. The reception and concierge teams were also exceptional — consistently polite, professional, and quick to help with anything we needed.

We originally booked a two-bedroom villa but once we found its location, away from the beach and tucked away in a corner too far from the Hotel, we upgraded to a VIP spacious three-bedroom villa, beach views and 30m from the hotel restaurants which is ideal for a family or group stay. Each of the three double bedrooms had its own en-suite bathroom, desk, large TV, and very comfortable bed. The villa was well designed, with plenty of space to relax, dine, and enjoy time together without feeling crowded. The interior and exterior lighting were particularly well thought out and really enhanced the atmosphere in the evenings. The private pool was another highlight: large, warm, and perfect for swimming rather than just dipping in.

The food experience was also very good. Breakfast at Cocoon restaurant offered a huge variety of options, with something for everyone. Room service Burger and fries was super tasty!
The evening buffet was enjoyable too, and the twice-weekly BBQ nights on Wednesdays and Saturdays were a real highlight. There was a lively atmosphere, a great variety of food, and even though the rain cut the live band short after around two hours, it was still a fun evening.

VinWonders was also a fun experience, with plenty of rides and activities to enjoy.
reviews.negatives: The only disappointing points were related to privacy in the villa. The entrance door had no curtains or frosted glass, meaning neighbours could see directly into our dining area, which felt a little insecure. Also, the private pool was not private, as neighbours and passersby had visibility into the area. For the price we paid, we would expect full privacy.

reviews.title: Fantastic resort that ticks all the boxes for a family of 5 with 3 older teens.
reviews.positives: Fantastic resort with everything you need incl spa, gym, pools plus golf course and amusement park a 3-5 min cart ride away. Vin Wonders was great and no lines when we were there (in fact almost had the place to ourselves in January).  My 17 yo sons loved the golf - caddy included!  All staff amazing.  We stayed in 3 bedroom villa which is huge and beautiful private pool.  Food options limited but still very good.  Breakfast sensational - everything you could want for breakfast is there.  Bar on 9th floor also good to get some views and have a drink and snacks.
reviews.negatives:
Food options limited (ie only 2 restaurants - buffet and a la carte korean/indian/viet) but the resort does everything it can to make sure you can always find something you will enjoy including offering room service menu with more western options.  Hoi An only a 20 min cab ride away too.
The resort has a kitchen but there is no ability to cook or serve food (ie not plates, cutlery, cooking utensils etc).  Didnt bother us but photos feature kitchen so others may expect some self catering.
I note these things just for people to manage expectations.  Did not impact our stay.

reviews.title: Perfect for a family trip!! & It was perfect for a golf trip!
reviews.text: I went with my family.  It can be a bit inconvenient to go to Ebu as it is quietly inside Hoi An, but the facilities inside the resort are good, so you can spend 2 nights and 3 days comfortably.  We had a full booking including dinner, breakfast, and lunch, and we liked all the meals so much that both my son and husband loved the excellent quality of the meals.  Also, there was a Korean manager, so I was able to ask questions about the details, which made me feel very comfortable.  To go to Bing Wonders, the buggy was too easy to get around if the time was right.  However, it is recommended that you bring food as all Bean Wonders are closed due to the corona virus.  It was a waste of time to go outside, so I used a massage shop at the spa at the resort.  And the most recommended thing is that you can use the swimming pool after check-out, and you can use the resort spa after using the swimming pool to finish off perfectly.

reviews.positives: As described. Lucas (manager) was very helpful in changing our rooms where the aircon broke.
reviews.negatives: Check in was literally after 2pm. We got there early as our flight arrived early and waited in the lobby. reviews.title: It was such a happy time.
reviews.text:
It was quite far from the city, so I had some concerns about meals, but everything else was perfect ^^ I solved meals outside of the hotel breakfast using Grab and VinWonders. 
* The room size and cleanliness were very good. 
(I always wore slippers because the floor wasn't very clean, but it wasn't uncomfortable.) 
* All drinks in the water and refrigerator were free (according to resort standards). 
* The breakfast had everything you would expect and was sufficient for a light morning meal. 
(The omelet was delicious, and the pho was also tasty. Be sure to try the coffee at the bar near the entrance!) 
* The swimming pool is really large. I didn't think much of it, but my child had a great time playing there. 
(They provide life jackets, towels, and there is a place to inflate tubes.) 
* Be sure to visit the private beach~ 
(The seawater was cool and didn't get too deep, so I had a lot of fun playing with my child on the tube. The sunbeds were well set up and perfect for relaxing, but it was a bit disappointing that they were a little far from the sea.) 
* Definitely add the VIP feeding experience at VinWonders Safari; it will be a great experience for the price^^ 
Also, the staff were generally very friendly and greeted us with bright smiles whenever we encountered them~ 
The two-night stay went by so fast that I felt a bit sad during checkout~!! I will definitely come back here next time~~

reviews.title: Vinpearl Nam Hoi An Pool Villa
reviews.text: It was a revisit after almost 7-8 years. I made reservations through Agoda to get the maximum discount with fond memories. With three children, the room size was always a bit tricky, but this place had villas so it was easy to find a room. The facilities were still in good condition, and the resort pool was spacious and pleasant with very few users, giving it a feeling like we had rented it out entirely. The room pool was also very large, so after the resort pool closed at 7 PM, we always continued playing in the room pool until bedtime. Most of our meals were at the resort restaurant; we had the buffet at the Cocoon Restaurant twice, ordered from the menu at the An Restaurant once, and dined at a Korean restaurant while exploring Old Town once. The An Restaurant offered Korean dishes including pork belly and local food, which was nice. The Cocoon Restaurant had really delicious wood-fired pizza and ice cream, but as a result, that menu was quite crowded with people (locals). The dining etiquette of the locals didn't seem to be very high. Our meal at the Korean restaurant in Old Town was very satisfying. Since we mainly stayed at the resort, the location wasn't very important to us, but it was about a 20-minute taxi ride to Old Town, which made it convenient to eat and come back after taking a boat. The resort has a golf course and offers discounts for guests, so we played early morning golf twice during our stay. They provided all the clubs and drove us around, making it very convenient. The management was good, making it a great place for exercise. We joined other couples for golf on the first day, and on the second day, we were the only two on the course. It was a wonderful trip spent fully without any shortcomings during our 4 nights and 5 days. I would definitely consider revisiting.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
It's an hour from central Danang. 25mins from Hoi An old Quarter.  Abit further but  you get a beach front resort. White sand beach, very clean and safe for children. 
Biggest swimming pool I  have ever experienced.  Ans again safe for children at all ages.
Staff are so helpful. My son wasn't well . We called the reception at 1am and the nurse came within less than 5mins.
The bed is big , comfy but had a funny noise as it lost 1 leg. Can clean the floor in the room everyday. 
The restaurants were very good.
In general,  Cant ask for a better service. So worth the money.

reviews.title: Sixtieth birthday trip
reviews.text: Last week, I stayed for 4 nights with my family. I also went with my family last Christmas. However, a relative wanted to go on a sixteenth birthday trip with the family, so I recommended Vinpearl, and we went together again. We used the hotel shuttle for transportation. The driver was very kind, and the reservation manager, Ms. Thao, was always very helpful every time we went. We couldn't go to Vinwonder due to a typhoon, but we enjoyed a delicious breakfast and instead spent our time relaxing and having fun at the pool villa. The facilities in the room were good, room service was tasty, and the pool villa’s swimming pool was clean and accessible. When we got tired from moving back and forth in the living room, we could eat and play some more while enjoying the sight of the rough waves at sea and the fun of swimming in the calm pool. We plan to go back around this Chuseok. We ordered BBQ in the villa for the sixteenth birthday party, and we felt a unique experience that we couldn’t feel in Korea. Everyone who went together was extremely satisfied. By the way, we made the reservation through Agoda.

reviews.title: MAGNIFICENT! We will be back.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was our favourite meal here. The staff were amazing in all areas: reception, pool bar, restaurants, room service. This is the best service we have ever received, and big smiles all around. The resort was very grand with clean buildings and beautiful features. It was well air conditioned at the perfect temperature, even in the lifts. VinWonders was also AMAZING, for the one ticket we got access to a theme park, water park and even had a zoo safari on boat. Thank you for looking after us!
reviews.negatives: The location meant we had to order Grabs to Hoi An which made it pricey. The shuttle was an option but you must book 4 hours in advance and we just weren’t prepared enough. However, we did enjoy supporting the Grab drivers as they really needed business so this turned out to be a great way to support local.

reviews.title: Great pool and beach
reviews.text:
The staff are very friendly and attentive. The breakfast is delicious and varied, especially the Vietnamese coffee which is very good. The pool and beach are beautiful, spacious, and clean, and friendly for children. The day we went was my daughter's birthday, and the resort gifted us a very beautiful and tasty cake. 
However, the location is a bit far from Da Nang Airport and the Hoi An Old Town center. 
I suggest an ocean view room, which is beautiful and spacious.

reviews.title: Perfect.
reviews.text:
Airport pickup or drop-off is available every 2 hours.  
They provide a van that can fit around 16 people, and the air conditioning is great, so it’s definitely worth using.  
The cleanliness of the accommodation is perfect.  
The swimming pool and the beach are really the best.  
It’s also good for swimming in the sea.  
The water is shallow enough to play comfortably even for kids.  
The pool water is warm; it would have been even better if it were cooler.  
Breakfast is delicious, and there is a Korean restaurant in the resort, but don't eat the spicy pork!  
The seaweed soup and steamed eggs were really tasty.  
Check-in is quick as soon as the room is ready, and you can check out a bit leisurely.  
There is an ATM in the resort, and currency exchange is possible (Korean Won is available).  
You must try the vanilla and chocolate milkshakes at the pool bar!!!!

reviews.title: Unbelievable Luxury Villa Experience
reviews.text:
We made a last minute honeymoon booking for a 2-BR villa and on our arrival were upgraded to a 3-BR, private pool, ocean view villa because they were out of 2-BRs. Incredible facilities, service, and hospitality (thank you Phuc). 

The main pool and beach were massive. A mile of private beach coastline with lounge seats and umbrellas. There were also volleyball nets, football goals, and space for tossing a frisbee.  Multiple restaurants - we had the breakfast buffet each morning and had lunch at the korean BBQ restaurant with delicious Japanese A5 Wagyu for a great price. 

There were electric shuttles from the lobby to the private  villas. They had roses petals arranged on the master bed and a cake on the dining table. The rooms were spacious, clean, well maintained, and comfortable. The massive floor to ceiling windows, automatic blinds, and large chandeliers were a highlight. The doors to the villa opened up completely to show the view of the ocean and the private pool. One of the most luxurious experiences of my life. I plan to be back soon and to bring as many of my friends with me to share in the joy I felt here.

reviews.title: Nam Hoi An Vinpearl 👍👍👍👍👍👍
reviews.text:
First of all, the biggest reason why Vin Wonders chose Da Nang is... Vin Wonders is optimized for visiting Nam Hoi An Vinpearl! Thumbs up!

It's close and just a 3-minute ride by buggy.

After having breakfast, we play in the water at Vin Wonders, take a shower and rest at the hotel, 

Then after sunset, we go back (in and out is totally possible) to enjoy the River Safari, amusement park, and the fountain show, and comfortably return to our accommodation by buggy. ♡♡♡♡

The hotel staff are very friendly, and the room condition is also excellent. The drainage works well, and the toilet is clean.

One thing that was a bit disappointing is that the breakfast menu is limited, and the taste is...ㅠㅠ

Additionally, since Nam Hoi An is somewhat remote, we should enjoy a hotel stay, but there aren't many restaurants or they're not very good...ㅜ

Although I was somewhat disappointed with the dining aspect, the private beach was excellent, and the pool was spacious and really nice.

reviews.title: A trip that satisfied the whole family.
reviews.text: We chose a 3-bedroom villa for a family trip, and we scored a lot from check-in. We stayed for 5 nights and 6 days, and we used the pool in front of the accommodation and the large pool at the beach at least twice a day, making it a fulfilling experience. Although it was a bit far from the airport, we used a third-party checkout tour to visit Ba Na Hills, and we went to the Old Town in the evening with a hotel shuttle service for a fee. It was hot, so we barely managed to do the safari at VinWonders. The amenities like housekeeping and kids' club were also decent. Cooking in the hotel is not allowed, but they will heat up pre-cooked rice that you bring. Housekeeping requests were attended to within 10 minutes. As one of the best hotels in Vietnam, it was really well maintained and clean.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr./Mrs. Hyo,

The entire team looks forward to the pleasure of welcoming you back to the Vinpearl Resort & Golf Nam Hoi An soon.

Yours very truly,
David Jamieson - General Manager

reviews.title: Best accommodation
reviews.text: We used a three-room villa as there were no available two-room pool villas (one room was locked and we only used the two rooms). It was clean, and during our three-night stay, they tidied up neatly every day. All the staff were friendly, and above all, it was very convenient because it was close to Bin Wonders and we received discounts for guests. The breakfast was quite noisy due to many families with children, but since we are also a family with kids, we understood each other. The pool villa was well maintained, making it a very enjoyable trip. I thought it would be great to bring my parents and more family members to stay together if we have the chance.

reviews.title: Le point fort : la gentillesse et la courtoisie du Personnel
reviews.text:
Immense structure sur une immense plage privée, adaptée aux groupes et aux familles. Les restaurants buffet Cocoon et Lantern offrent un choix variés pouvant correspondre à la majorité -son personnel est exceptionnellement gentil attentif et aidant. Nous remercions particulièrement Mrs Huong (manager de la restauration) Mrs Thao et Nguyen Thao les Supervisors, Mrs Ly et ses collègues waitresses, le personnel des cuisines d’avoir rendu chacun de nos repas très agréable. Notre villa piscine privée vue sur l’océan (villa 8501) était confortable et propre. Les jardins verdoyants sont parfaitement entretenus de façon pluriquotidennes dans un climat pourtant tropical torride. Les massages sont qualitatifs- les masseuses sont expérimentées et très gentilles et le personnel de réception est très aimable.
Merci au Duty Manager Mrs Tu Anh et Mr Thanh Luân de chacune de leurs interventions pour la résolution de chaque problème et/ou petite difficulté.  Notre séjour de 14 nuits s’est bien passé.

reviews.title: Wonderful resort with Water and amusement park and very big swimming pool
reviews.text:
Avantages: Wonderful resort with Water and amusement park and very big huge swimming pool.

Disadvantage: what we did not like:
1. NO vietnamese coffee, NO VIETNAMESE GREEN TEA at breakfast and in the room. 

We are very disappointed because we travelled from far countries and it would be nice for us to discover good local products and good local foods.
It is also for ecology, social responsabilities and sustainability for local people.

2. TOO LITTLE PRODUCTS FROM VIETNAM such as shampoing, bath, perfum... Most of the products in this hotel are imported products from far away countries, whereas we have equivalent and very good quality products from Vietnam and from local people.  We traveled from far, we want to see something different and more specific to the country that we visit.
We do not understand and we do not support this.

reviews.title: Parfait pour les familles
reviews.text: 2eme séjour, cette fois début septembre. J'ai aimé l'exécutif King suite. Grande et confortable.  Le personnel attentif. Loin de Hoi An mais prêt de VinWonders. Je conseille cet hôtel pour les familles avec enfants en bas âge,  mais je ne pense pas revenir etant sans enfants à cette période de l'année.  Car beaucoups de familles coréennes car c'est la période de vacances scolaires et c'est particulièrement Bruyant en particulier au petit-déjeuner.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr GADOUX YVAN GABRIEL MARCEL,
Thank you for choosing to stay with us for the second time and for sharing your detailed feedback.
We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed the comfort of our Executive King Suite and appreciated the attentiveness of our staff. It's wonderful to know that your family had a pleasant experience, and that our location near VinWonders suited your needs.
We understand your comments about the noise during the school holiday period and truly appreciate your honesty. We always aim to create a comfortable environment for all guests and will continue to improve our services to better accommodate different types of travelers, especially during peak family travel seasons.
Once again, thank you for your recommendation for families with young children. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in a quieter season, should your travels bring you to the area again.
Warm regards,
